description_long: This jacuzzi features an octagonal stone exterior wall with a textured, natural rock appearance, set atop a green, grassy base. The interior is filled with a white or light-colored surface, simulating water, and contains two prominent dark rocks, one large and one small, positioned off-center. Several small orange koi fish are visible swimming within the water, adding a decorative and tranquil element. The jacuzzi lacks visible jets, control panels, or steps, giving it a minimalist, naturalistic design reminiscent of a Japanese rock garden. The water level appears nearly full, with the surface close to the top edge of the stone wall. The overall look is rustic and blends harmoniously with outdoor or park environments.
description: An octagonal stone-walled jacuzzi with a nearly full white water surface, decorated with rocks and koi fish, set on a grassy base.
description_view_0: The jacuzzi is seen from an angle highlighting the large central rock, smaller rock, and several koi fish on the white water surface.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the stone wall texture and shows the large rock, small rock, and koi fish more clearly from the side.
description_view_2: The large central rock dominates the view, with fewer visible koi fish and a clear look at the stone wall's upper edge.
description_view_3: Both rocks and some koi fish are visible, with the stone wall and grassy base prominent in the foreground.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water surface close to the top edge
